Flash Kanji/Kanji/N3/受
受

Flash Kanji JSON · JLPT N3

受 — accept, answer (phone), catch, get

Appears in N3 words across interfaces, reading passages, notifications and real Japanese apps.

N38 strokesN3: media and society 03
Onyomiじゅ
Kunyomiうけ / うかる / うける
Open in app

Facts

Meanings
accept, answer (phone), catch, get
Onyomi
じゅ
Kunyomi
うけ / うかる / うける
Romaji
uke / ukaru / ukeru
JLPT
N3
Strokes
8
Radical
受 accept
Lesson
N3: media and society 03
Unicode
U+53D7
ID
10273

Useful words

  • 口受 くじゅ · kuju восприятие на слух; учёба со слов
  • 受戒 じゅかい · jukai принятие закона (т. е. заповедей и предписаний при обращении в буддизм)
  • 受精 じゅせい · jusei оплодотворение

Example sentences

  • 受を見ます。うけ / うかる / うけるI look at the kanji 受.

Interface contexts

News apps Review 受 Appears in N3 words across interfaces, reading passages, notifications and real Japanese apps.

Writing and stroke order

受

Precise KanjiVG paths are not available yet. Use the in-app translucent template for self-check.

  1. 1Всего черт: 8. Начинай с верхних и левых элементов.
  2. 2Двигайся сверху вниз и слева направо, сохраняя пропорции.
  3. 3Пересекающие и закрывающие черты обычно выполняй ближе к концу.

Flash Kanji note

What to watch

Learn 受 through words first, then reinforce it in sentence and writing practice.

Related kanji

世 · world, generation界 · world, boundary, industry投 · to post, throw, invest報 · report, information政 · government, politics民 · nation, people, subjects
